Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant Bell Fund Vii Cadence, Llc To Reclassify Case From Unlimited Jurisdiction To Limited Jurisdiction (Cal. Code Civ. Proc. Section 403.040); Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Oct-09-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BELL FUND VII CADENCE, LLC's Motion By Defendant Bell Fund Vii Cadence, LLC To Reclassify Case From Unlimited Jurisdiction To Limited Jurisdiction (Cal. Code Civ. Proc. Section 403.040).

Off calendar for department 301. The motion may be re-filed to be heard in department 501. That department hears all law and motion matters in cases involving the rental of real property per Local Rule 8.10A.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)
